title: Session 05 — Ms. Judy’s Return
bodyText:
**TL;DR: The party survived the stage-4 fight (despite Brolin torching the house) and saved the meat wall; a returning Judy pinned the Underdark poisoning on Root and brewed a concentrate that pauses the sickness ~a week per dose.**

# What happened
- The stage-4 fight (wood-bladed infected + a flowered stag) went well until **[[pc-brolin|Brolin]] set the house on fire**.
- They fell back, argued, cleared the outside, controlled the blaze — and crucially **saved the meat wall**.
- On her return, Judy reported: a vast **single-source vine network**; more spore pods (destroyed → magic mushrooms); and **deliberate poisoning/extermination** of Underdark wildlife near the Darkpass digs.
- She told Brolin privately she's confident **[[root-darkpass|Root]] is responsible**.
- From three blue mushrooms she brewed the **concentrate** (pauses the sickness ~a week per dose).
- Parting gifts: conjured creatures (a toad and a roach).

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] The stage-4 outbreak — put down; house fire controlled, meat wall saved.
- Judy's private accusation to Brolin: **Root is responsible** for the Underdark poisoning ([[root-darkpass]]).

# Threads
[[root-darkpass]] · [[pc-brolin]]
